svg.title: SecureNotes DevSecOps Security Pipeline
svg.desc: Human-styled DevSecOps pipeline with fixed pass/fail outcome boxes where icons and text no longer overlap.
svg.text: container security · static analysis · vulnerability enforcement
writes Flask app locally, commits changes
code lands, webhook fires the pipeline
picks up the workflow, spins up a fresh runner
scans OS layers & packages for known CVEs
Flask · Docker · GitHub · GitHub Actions · Hadolint · Trivy
